'''Force energy''' was [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] when not directly used by organics but contained into objects or manifesting itself as raw, pure energy. Before the dawn of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Old Republic]], [[Force Hound]] [[Tau (individual)|Xesh]] used a blast of Force energy to damage the [[Devourer (Rakatan ship)|''Devourer''{{'s}}]] power core.

The [[Infant of Shaa]] and the [[Scepter of Ragnos]] were such Force-storing objects. Force energy could be used as a direct weapon, such as through the Scepter of [[Marka Ragnos]], or it could be released as an explosion that would cause great physical damage, such as through the Infant of [[Shaa]].

Extremely powerful [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitives]] could draw from the infinite reservoir of the Force and use its power to physically attack enemies. [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] where able to do this to destroy [[Marvid Qreph|Marvid]] and [[Craitheus Qreph]], and [[Palpatine/Legends|Darth Sidious']] power had become so great after his rebirth, that he was able to injure a number of assailants with a continuous blast of energy. In [[11 ABY/Legends|11 ABY]] during the [[Battle of Onderon (Galactic Civil War)|Battle of Onderon]] Palpatine used force energy to mortally wound the [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Empatojayos Brand]] and kill [[Rayf Ysanna]] after being underestimated by the young [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]].
